title: athyrium integrifolium
intro: Athyrium integrifolium, also known as the Lady Fern or Western Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Athyrium integrifolium include its potential to alleviate symptoms of allergies, colds, and flu, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
